scripts.assets:generate: bash -lc 'set -e; mkdir -p assets ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset; sips -s format png -z 1024 1024 src/assets/icon/favicon.png --out assets/icon-only.png; sips -z 40 40 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-20@2x.png; sips -z 60 60 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-20@3x.png; sips -z 58 58 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-29@2x.png; sips -z 87 87 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-29@3x.png; sips -z 80 80 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-40@2x.png; sips -z 120 120 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-40@3x.png; sips -z 120 120 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-60@2x.png; sips -z 180 180 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-60@3x.png; sips -z 20 20 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-20-ipad.png; sips -z 40 40 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-20@2x-ipad.png; sips -z 29 29 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-29-ipad.png; sips -z 58 58 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-29@2x-ipad.png; sips -z 40 40 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-40-ipad.png; sips -z 80 80 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-40@2x-ipad.png; sips -z 76 76 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-76-ipad.png; sips -z 152 152 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-76@2x-ipad.png; sips -z 167 167 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-83.5@2x-ipad.png; sips -z 1024 1024 assets/icon-only.png --out ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon-1024.png'
scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && bash -lc 'cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease'
scripts.build:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.build:platforms: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap sync ios
scripts.dev:ios: nohup npm run start -- --host=0.0.0.0 --port 4300 >/dev/null 2>&1 & npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.hot:ios: nohup npm run start >/dev/null 2>&1 & env CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):4300 npx cap sync ios && env CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):4300 npx cap open ios
scripts.dev:android:emulator: nohup npm run start -- --host=0.0.0.0 --port 4300 >/dev/null 2>&1 & env CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:4300 npx cap sync android && env CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:4300 npx cap open android
scripts.dev:android:device: nohup npm run start -- --host=0.0.0.0 --port 4300 >/dev/null 2>&1 & env CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):4300 npx cap sync android && env CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):4300 npx cap open android
scripts.run:ios:everit: bash -lc 'set -e; DEVURL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0):4300; DEVICE=$(xcrun xctrace list devices 2>/dev/null | sed -n "s/^iPhone de Everit Jhon (\([A-F0-9-]*\)).*/\1/p" | head -n1); nohup npm run start >/dev/null 2>&1 & CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=$DEVURL npx cap sync ios; if [ -n "$DEVICE" ]; then CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=$DEVURL npx cap run ios --target "$DEVICE"; else CAP_DEV=true CAP_SERVER_URL=$DEVURL npx cap open ios; fi'
